name: ABAB
short_description: This game is too simple "AB Button" Puzzle Game to be not lost!
detailed_description:
The "AB Button Puzzle Game" is too simple to be not lost!







Hmm?




The familiar "AB button" is in motion😀

Press Hold Drag&Drop etc...
Let's see what you can do😝




Oh, before I forget, please use AB of your keyboard😄

■Overview
This is a puzzle game that can be played using the mouse and keyboard, and is too simple to be not lost.
There is nothing difficult.

■How to play
Click or hold down the AB button.
AB button should have some movement.
If you fill AB to the clear condition, you will clear the game.

■Suitable for play the game
  • Want to play in a very short time, or want to play for a little while in a gap.
  • Those who want to play by clicking buttons rather than puzzles.
  • Not good at complicated puzzles.

■NOTES
There is no save function in this game.
You cannot use a gamepad.

■Others
This game has no text, but English is used only for credits.
